title: Huawei OSGXGSC+01, XGS-PON/XG-PON/GPON OLT SFP+ optical module, Class C+
description: The Huawei OSGXGSC+01 XGS-PON/XG-PON/GPON SFP+ module is designed for slots in Huawei OLT units. It is a C+ class module, terminated with an SC connector with UPC polishing and offering a transmission distance of up to 20km . The module has different characteristics when used in XGS-PON, XG-PON and GPON
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1.244 / 2.488 Gbps, 9,95 / 9,95 Gbps, 9,95 / 2,44 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1490 / 1310, 1577 / 1270 Distance [km] 20 Transfer type GPON, XG-PON, XGS-PON Polishing type UPC Tx power [dBm] 4.5 up to 8.5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 32 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) SC
